calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-11-2006 Dismissal - Appeal Abandoned

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-02-2006 Continued To Jul-12-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: 10:00am
Judge Bruce M. Lubarsky, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record
Cause called for Small Claims appeal. Ryan Sheets, Esq. appearing for respondent, Rukayat O. Mustapha, Edward C. Singer, Jr. appearing for Citi Apartments, Inc., appellant.
Mr. Sheets gives opening statements. Mr. Singer gives opening statements. Mr. Singer states he believes there was an outstanding default, but the ROA shows the case is set for trial de novo, not a motion. Mr. Sheets requests a continuance so his client can appear personally.
10:15am
The Court determines the matter will be reset as a "rehearing" on July 12, 2006, 9:00am. Court will provide notice. NO FURTHER CONTINUANCES TO BE ALLOWED.
